metadata.description: Crop growth data for land optimization in RavenQuest Companion
metadata.notes: Schema v2.1: Added professionXP (renamed from experience) and legacyXP fields. Experience and detailed yields to be filled manually from in-game data.

schema.gathering: Repeatable harvest data (time, professionXP, legacyXP, yields)
schema.butchering: One-time harvest data for animals (time, professionXP, legacyXP, yields)
schema.legacy: growthTime and yields fields kept for backward compatibility
